holdings.n: BNY Dreyfus Treasury Securities Cash Management Institutional Shares

overview.description: The iShares Securitized Income Active ETF (SECU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund actively invests in securitized assets in the US, concentrating on non-agency mortgage-backed securities. The fund may hold both investment grade and high yield securities of any maturity in seeking a high total return. SECU was launched on Jan 23, 2026 and is issued by BlackRock.
